title: Telegram
summary: Full Telegram surface (read + write) acting as your Telegram account, via the vendored telegram-mcp engine.

secrets.label: Telegram API ID
secrets.hint: my.telegram.org → API development tools → create an app

secrets.label: Telegram API hash
secrets.hint: same page as the API ID

secrets.label: Telegram session string
secrets.hint: run the engine's session_string_generator.py once with the ID/hash and log in

notes: Acts as YOUR Telegram account — writes send real messages; consider gating them in the manage panel.
Returns untrusted external content: the guardrail sidecar starts automatically with this tool.
If your approval channel is ALSO Telegram, remember the pairing caveat in security/approval/service/env.example.
